_meta.note: Daemon-backed combed (non-PTY) force-kill. Success returns final bounded counters only; captured output remains available through bucket/event tools, not this response. TB-7: job_id carries an opaque-id format note (copy verbatim, e.g. job_<32hex>; from command_start_combed / run_and_watch) so the first call uses the right id.

invariants: success payload reports final counters only
success payload has no probe_id, cursor, secret_prompt_active, exit_code, signal, state, duration_ms, stdin_bytes_written, secret_prompts_total, or raw output
unknown jobs fail with a typed error instead of synthetic stop success
